# Founders KSA

> Your gateway to entrepreneurship in Saudi Arabia. Real founder stories, startup resources, and ecosystem insights.

## About

Founders KSA documents the journeys of entrepreneurs building in Saudi Arabia. We provide founder stories, ecosystem insights, and startup resources for anyone looking to build in the Kingdom.

## How to Read Our Content (for AI agents & crawlers)

This is a single-page application. To read full article content as plain text, use our API:

- **All articles:** https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article
- **Specific article:** https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug={slug}
- **Full content file:** [llms-full.txt](https://foundersksa.com/llms-full.txt)

## Pages

- [Home](https://foundersksa.com/)
- [Founder Stories](https://foundersksa.com/stories)
- [Insights](https://foundersksa.com/insights)
- [About & Contact](https://foundersksa.com/about)

## Founder Stories

- [From Teenage Coder to 5 Million Downloads — Salman, NJD Studio](https://foundersksa.com/stories/njd-studio) | [Plain text](https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=njd-studio)
- [From the Janitor's Closet to the Boardroom — Sir Alain Edene, Fittin International](https://foundersksa.com/stories/alain-edene) | [Plain text](https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=alain-edene)
- [Rooted in Resilience: Riyadh's Farm-to-Table Café — Lulwah Al Juraiban, Treehouse](https://foundersksa.com/stories/treehouse) | [Plain text](https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=treehouse)
- [The Architect of Startups in Saudi Arabia — Hassan Ikram, Cotyledon](https://foundersksa.com/stories/hassan-ikram) | [Plain text](https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=hassan-ikram)
- [From Banking to Biotech — Faisal Shaker](https://foundersksa.com/stories/faisal-shaker) | [Plain text](https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=faisal-shaker)
- [The Science of Possibility — Dr. Hayat Sindi](https://foundersksa.com/stories/dr-hayat-sindi) | [Plain text](https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=dr-hayat-sindi)
